/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -fPIC -ftemplate-depth=256 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 0.1.0 -current_version 0.1.0 -o ../output/libppconsul.0.1.dylib -install_name @rpath/libppconsul.0.1.dylib CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/consul.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/health.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/client_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/kv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/sessions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/curl/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/__/ext/b64/cdecode.c.o CMakeFiles/ppconsul.dir/__/ext/b64/cencode.c.o  ../output/libjson11.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
